w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Initial PRD — Stripe payments, Make.com automation,
replaces Stripe. Direct Meta Cloud API replaces

replaces Make.com. Red #F20000 palette confirmed. Target audience sharpened to yoga/wellness/nutrition. WhatsApp template strategy integrated. DB schema updated with gateway-agnostic naming. Build status tracker added.

is a SaaS business operating system for independent fitness, wellness, and yoga coaches. It automates the three most time-consuming admin tasks in a coaching business: client onboarding with payment, weekly WhatsApp check-ins with AI summary, and program renewal reminders.
Everything runs on WhatsApp. No app for clients to download. No behaviour change required. The coach sets up once in 30 minutes. The system runs every week automatically after that.
manages 40 clients with the same effort it currently takes to manage 15.
Independent yoga, wellness, and nutrition coaches. Tier 1 cities. 12–20 active clients. Currently on Google Forms + Sheets + WhatsApp.
South Asian diaspora wellness coaches. Premium pricing. Expects professional tooling.
MVP launches with Basic Monthly only. Pro and Annual in Phase 2.
All stack decisions are final. Do not revisit without a documented reason.
Antigravity generates excellent Next.js. Unified frontend and API in one repo.
Fast, mobile-first. Antigravity handles it natively. No custom CSS files.
No separate backend needed for MVP. Cron routes handle scheduling.
Free tier generous. Row Level Security for multi-tenancy. Real-time subscriptions.
Coach login via email/password. JWT issued by
India-first. UPI, card, net banking. Stripe ruled out — India availability issues.
No BSP. Direct integration on +91 77383 63495. Phone Number ID: 838337922704261.
Gemini API via Google AI Studio
/min, 1M tokens/day. Sufficient for MVP summary generation.
fitosys.alchemetryx.com custom domain. A record points to
Never commit these to Git. Store
NEXT_PUBLIC_RAZORPAY_KEY_ID= # Only public key goes here
WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN= # Permanent System User token — Meta Business Manager
Weekly WhatsApp Check-in Automation with Gemini AI Summary
, webhook route. Direct Meta Cloud API.
Shell exists. Not wired to real data.
Next priority. 4 Antigravity tasks defined in Section 7.
T3 welcome template resubmit as Utility
Currently submitted as Marketing. Must resubmit.
All tables use UUID primary keys. All coach-specific tables include
for RLS enforcement. Column naming is gateway-agnostic — no stripe_ or
UUID REFERENCES coaches(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
UUID REFERENCES coaches(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
ALTER TABLE coaches ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE programs ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE clients ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE payments ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
-- Public intake — no RLS bypass needed
key only in webhook handlers and
All templates submitted via Meta WhatsApp Manager. Direct Cloud API on +91 77383 63495. No BSP. Phone Number ID: 838337922704261.
24-hour free service window opens every time a client replies. Build onboarding so clients reply first — this is the highest-ROI cost optimisation available.
/auth/signup -- Coach signup. Creates coach record + slug.
-- Public: coach programs for intake form (no auth)
-- AI summary for a given week
These routes require NO auth JWT. They verify signatures independently.
-secret header against CRON_SECRET env var before executing.
-- Sunday 7PM IST — fires T1 to all active clients
/renewal-check -- Daily 10AM UTC — fires T2A at 7 days remaining
-- Daily 10AM UTC — fires T2B if T2A no reply after 48h
-summary -- Monday 7AM IST — Gemini summary + WhatsApp to coach
Each coach gets a unique link at fitosys.alchemetryx.com/join/[slug]. The client fills an intake form, selects a program, and pays via
— UPI, card, or net banking. Everything on one page. No redirects to another platform.
Coach: I want a shareable onboarding link so clients can onboard without me guiding them step by step.
Coach: I want to receive a WhatsApp notification the moment a client pays so I can send a personal welcome.
Coach: I want the client to appear in my dashboard immediately after payment with no manual entry.
Client: I want to fill one form and pay in one step. The process should take under 5 minutes.
Client: I want a WhatsApp confirmation immediately after payment so I know I am registered.
With country code. Used as client identifier.
Weight Loss / Muscle Gain / Flexibility / Overall Fitness / Mental Wellness / Spiritual Practice
Renders coach's active programs with price
Webhook: verify signature → idempotency check → create client → create
→ create payment record → fire T3 WhatsApp to client → fire freeform notification to coach
Onboarding link live within 24 hours of coach account creation
Client completes form and pays in under 5 minutes
WhatsApp notifications sent within 60 seconds of
Client appears in coach dashboard within 2 minutes of payment
Failed payment creates no orphan records in database
webhook handles duplicate payment IDs idempotently — check
7.2 Feature 2 — Weekly Check-in Automation with AI Summary
Every Sunday at 7 PM IST (per coach

config), T1 check-in message fires to all active clients. Clients reply on WhatsApp. Replies are stored. Every Monday at 7 AM IST, Gemini processes all responses and delivers a structured summary to the coach.
Hi {{1}}, it's your weekly check-in with Coach {{2}}
Quick check-in — reply with your answers:
Takes 60 seconds. Your coach reads every reply.
Prompt sent to Gemini API every Monday at 7 AM. Temperature: 0.3. Max tokens: 512. Model: gemini-2.0-flash.

Output must include exactly these sections: RESPONSE RATE / NEEDS ATTENTION (up to 3) / STRONG PROGRESS (up to 3) / GROUP AVERAGE / THIS WEEK PRIORITY / NON-RESPONDERS. Total under 150 words. No filler phrases.
Check-in messages sent within 5-minute window of configured time
matched to correct client via WhatsApp phone number
Multiple messages from same client concatenated into single
Gemini summary generated and delivered by 7:15 AM Monday
If Gemini fails: retry once after 4 seconds, once after 16 seconds, once after 60 seconds. After third failure: store as failed, notify coach of delay.
Coach can view historical summaries for any previous week in dashboard
at 10 AM UTC checks for programs ending in 7 days. Sends T2A (Utility, factual info, no payment link). If no reply within 48 hours, fires T2B (Marketing, with
payment link). If still unpaid after program end, flags coach in dashboard.
Send payment link inside free 24h window
No payment after program end + 3 days
No duplicate renewal messages within same 7-day window — check renewal_reminder_1_sent flag
payment link in T2B is pre-filled with correct amount and client metadata
by one program duration from payment date — not restart from today
Coach notification sent within 60 seconds of renewal payment
Churn logging is optional but prompted in dashboard
Home — stat cards + attention list + renewals + summary preview
Client list — table with filters, search, click-to-profile
Client profile — overview, check-in history, payment history
Programs — list, toggle active, add new, copy onboarding link
Weekly Pulse — current AI summary, 8-week response rate chart, history
Payments — monthly revenue chart, transaction list, date filter
Settings — profile, check-in config, billing, WhatsApp setup
CTAs, active states, key data points. Use sparingly.
Hero text, section headers, stat numbers.
jobs run as Next.js API routes triggered by
Query all coaches. For each: fetch active clients, send T1 check-in via WhatsApp. Log to
between today and today+7, status=active, reminder_1_sent=false. Send T2A. Set reminder_1_sent=true.
: reminder_1_sent=true, reminder_2_sent=false, reminder sent 48h+ ago, no payment since. Send T2B. Set reminder_2_sent=true.
For each coach: fetch last week's
< today AND status=active AND no payment in 3 days. Prompt coach to log churn reason.
— logs failure. Flags in dashboard if this was a renewal attempt.
Extract payment.id — check payments table for existing record (idempotency)
Send T3 WhatsApp welcome to client
Send freeform WhatsApp notification to coach
will retry and may create duplicate records. Handle all errors internally and log them.
Extract sender phone number from entry[0
Query clients: SELECT * FROM clients WHERE
Build in this exact order. Do not start the next task until the current one has zero TypeScript errors (
) and the core flow works end to end.
. Renders intake form with coach programs. On submit POSTs to /
. Loads checkout.js and opens payment modal. On success redirects to /join/[slug]/success.
— returns coach + active programs, no auth. Create POST /
. Does NOT create DB records yet.
, payment. Fire T3 WhatsApp + coach notification. Always return 200.
. Terminal page. Shows confirmation, program name, start date. No navigation links out. Tells client to expect WhatsApp message.
queries. Replace all mock data. Add loading states.
secret. Queries active coaches and clients. Calls
routes. Wire T2A and T2B templates. Update renewal flags in
Dashboard loads under 2 seconds on 4G mobile
WhatsApp messages sent within 60 seconds of trigger event
Gemini summary generation under 30 seconds per coach
on GET, validate sender origin on POST
No coach can access another coach's data — enforced at both RLS and application layer
NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix only on variables that must be exposed to the browser (
webhook handler is idempotent — duplicate events safe via
but do not crash other operations
Gemini API failure falls back with 3 retries (4s / 16s / 60s). After third: mark failed, notify coach.
Cron job failures alert to founder's WhatsApp
Architecture handles 500 coaches / 20,000 clients without changes
free tier sufficient for MVP. Scale at 1,000 daily active users.
All 3 features working end to end in staging
Multi-tenant data isolation tested with 2 dummy coach accounts
webhook tested with test keys locally
WhatsApp check-in tested with real replies on registered number
Gemini summary tested with real check-in data
Mobile responsive — tested on iPhone and Android
Permanent System User access token generated in Meta Business Manager
Webhook URL registered in Meta Developer App: https://fitosys.alchemetryx.com/api/webhook/whatsapp
India payment method added in Meta Billing Hub
fitosys.alchemetryx.com domain active and pointing to
Gemini API key active in Google AI Studio
First real coach onboarded and active
